Uses of Package
neqsim.process.operations.envelope

Packages that use neqsim.process.operations.envelope
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.operations.envelope
Operational envelope evaluation built on existing equipment capacity constraints.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.operations.envelope used by neqsim.mcp.runners
    Class
    Description
    MarginTrendTracker
    Tracks margin history and estimates time to zero margin with a linear trend.
  • Classes in neqsim.process.operations.envelope used by neqsim.process.operations.envelope
    Class
    Description
    MarginTrendTracker
    Tracks margin history and estimates time to zero margin with a linear trend.
    MarginTrendTracker.MarginSample
    Sample in a margin trend.
    MitigationSuggestion
    Advisory operating action suggested from a narrow or violated margin.
    MitigationSuggestion.Category
    Suggested action category.
    MitigationSuggestion.Priority
    Suggested action urgency.
    OperationalEnvelopeReport
    Report from an operational envelope evaluation.
    OperationalEnvelopeReport.EnvelopeStatus
    Overall operating-envelope status.
    OperationalMargin
    Snapshot of one operating margin derived from an equipment capacity constraint.
    OperationalMargin.Status
    Margin status thresholds used for operational screening.
    TripPrediction
    Advisory prediction that a margin may reach its limit within a time horizon.
    TripPrediction.Severity
    Prediction severity based on estimated time to limit.
